info.title: FileNetImport Widget API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the FileNetImport widget — a drag-and-drop document and folder import widget for IBM FileNet Content Engine via GraphQL, used in IBM Business Automation Workflow coach views.

FileNetImportOptions.description: Configuration options for the FileNetImport widget, set via getOption() in BAW Coach View designer.

graphqlEndpoint.description: Full URL of the FileNet Content Engine GraphQL API endpoint.

repositoryIdentifier.description: FileNet repository identifier (e.g., 'OS1'). This identifies which object store to use.

parentFolderPath.description: FileNet folder path where files will be imported. All imported files and recreated folder structures will be placed under this path.

maxFileSizeMB.description: Maximum allowed file size in megabytes. Files exceeding this limit are skipped with a warning in the log.

allowedMimeTypes.description: Comma-separated list of accepted MIME types. Empty string means all types are accepted.

documentClassIdentifier.description: Optional FileNet document class identifier (symbolic name) to use when creating documents. If empty, the classIdentifier field is not included in the mutation and FileNet uses the default Document class.

folderClassIdentifier.description: Optional FileNet folder class identifier (symbolic name) to use when creating folders. If empty, the classIdentifier field is not included in the mutation and FileNet uses the default Folder class.

ImportResult.description: Result object passed to the onImportComplete and onImportError event handlers after the import process finishes.

total.description: Total number of files that were processed in the import batch.

succeeded.description: Number of files successfully imported to FileNet.

failed.description: Number of files that failed to import due to errors.

repositoryIdentifier.description: The FileNet repository identifier that was used for this import batch.

parentFolderPath.description: The FileNet folder path that was used as the root destination for this import batch.

FileAddedInfo.description: Information about a file that was added to the import queue. Passed to the onFileAdded event handler.

path.description: Relative path of the file, preserving the original folder structure from the drag-and-drop operation.

GraphQLCreateFolderMutation.description: GraphQL mutation used to create a folder in FileNet Content Engine.

query.example: mutation CreateFolder($repoId: String!, $parentPath: String!, $name: String!) { createFolder(repositoryIdentifier: $repoId fileInFolderIdentifier: $parentPath folderProperties: { name: $name }) { id name pathName } }

parentPath.description: FileNet folder path of the parent folder.

name.description: Name of the folder to create.

GraphQLCreateFolderResponse.description: Response from the createFolder GraphQL mutation.

id.description: FileNet object ID of the newly created folder.

pathName.description: Full path of the created folder in FileNet.

GraphQLImportDocumentMutation.description: GraphQL mutation used to import a document into FileNet Content Engine via multipart form POST.

query.description: The GraphQL mutation string with variable placeholder for file content.
query.example: mutation ($contvar: String) { createDocument(repositoryIdentifier: "OS1" fileInFolderIdentifier: "/Folder for Browsing" documentProperties: { name: "report.pdf" contentElements: { replace: [{ type: CONTENT_TRANSFER contentType: "application/pdf" subContentTransfer: { content: $contvar } }] } } checkinAction: {}) { id name } }

variables.description: Variables object with null value for file content variable (actual file is in multipart form).

contvar.description: Placeholder variable that maps to the file part in the multipart form.

multipartForm.description: Multipart form structure for the request.

graphql.description: JSON string containing the query and variables.

GraphQLImportDocumentResponse.description: Response from the createDocument GraphQL mutation.

id.description: FileNet object ID of the newly created document.

size.description: Size of the document in bytes.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the document was created.

FileNetImportWidget.description: Complete FileNetImport widget configuration and data contract.
